failClosedPolicy: Consumers must stop on a missing or spoofed native Rust RuntimeBridge provider. Statically linked gameplay modules are part of the RuntimeBridge cell returned by createRuntimeBridge; no second gameplay host is accepted. The browser host must install globalThis.ashaRuntimeBridge before the downstream app boots and must not fall back to reference/mock authority.
pinningGuidance: Record ASHA git commit, browser-host.v0, and runtime-bridge.v0 in downstream browser-host evidence until registry/version publishing exists.
breakingChangeRequires: runtime bridge provider compatibility review when provider metadata changes
downstream asha-demo migration notes when command shape changes
